title: 1G+1G 25mm Metal Back Box Electrical Socket Switch Recessed Wall Pattress 2G Flush Mount 2 Gang Metal back box Pattress 25mm Box Back Box Dual - 1 PACK
features: DIMENSIONS: 1G+1G dual metal back box with 25mm depth, perfect for flush mounting electrical sockets and switches in standard wall installations
CONSTRUCTION: Made from durable pre-galvanised steel, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliable protection for electrical components
COMPATIBILITY: Suitable for mounting standard electrical sockets and switches, complete with pre-installed brass earth terminals
STANDARDS COMPLIANT: Manufactured in accordance with EN 60670 specifications for optimal safety and reliability
PACKAGE CONTENTS: One metal back box pattress suitable for 2-gang installations, featuring recessed design for flush wall mounting
description: This professional-grade 25mm metal back box is designed for flush mounting electrical sockets and switches in walls. Crafted from durable pre-galvanised steel, this 1G+1G (dual gang) pattress box provides a secure housing for your electrical installations. The box comes complete with brass earth terminals as standard, ensuring proper electrical grounding for safety. Meeting EN 60670 manufacturing standards, this recessed wall box offers reliable protection and support for your electrical fittings. The dual gang configuration allows for versatile installation options, making it ideal for both residential and commercial applications. Each pack contains one metal back box, perfect for new installations or replacement projects. The robust construction and precise engineering ensure a proper fit and long-lasting performance in your electrical system.
